'''Teedio''' was the lone primary star in the [[Teedio system/Legends|Teedio system]]. The star was prone to dangerous solar flares caused by some disaster in the distant past. Presently the recurring solar storms occur approximately every nine years.<ref name="JJK_KB">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]''</ref>

{{Star-stub}}
